title: [policy] Link-layer signature compliance
description: Policy: spec/06-security.md §8.3-8.5. MUST: (1) All TX packets signed with Ed25519/Schnorr48, (2) All RX packets verified before processing, (3) Signature covers non-mutable fields only, (4) Signature cache for relay efficiency. When executing: grep for sign/verify calls in TX/RX paths, create compliance bead per code section.
